name: cyr-onboarding-agent
description: Telegram onboarding bot that encrypts SSNs and stores submissions in PostgreSQL.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/bot.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/config/database.js && node --check src/services/submissions.js && node --check src/services/telegramApi.js && node --check src/utils/encryption.js && node --check src/utils/parser.js
